task_description: A cascading outage affected all services starting at 15:12 UTC. The 'email-sender' service crashed repeatedly, propagating failures through the dependency chain.

commits.author: alice@company.com
commits.message: hotfix: migrate to new circuit breaker library
commits.diff:
--- a/email-sender-service/circuit_breaker.go
+++ b/email-sender-service/circuit_breaker.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 16
+config.Timeout = 5 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
